error_signature: Error from Google when using HTTP Request tool
title: Error when sending JSON data to Google Calendar
symptom: The HTTP Request tool fails to send the complete JSON data to Google Calendar, resulting in an error response from the API.
applies_when: Using the HTTP Request tool to create events
JSON data is generated correctly by the AI agent
not_this_if: The JSON data is sent correctly without errors
root_cause: The HTTP Request tool is not configured to properly include the generated JSON data in the request body. This can happen if the body field is not set to accept the AI-generated output correctly.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request tool settings
Ensure the body field is set to use 'fromAI()' or marked for filling by AI
Test the workflow again to see if the error persists
agent_instruction: Configure the HTTP Request tool to accept the AI-generated JSON output correctly.
